title: Microsoft discovers new lightweight backdoor that steals cryptocurrency
summary: Microsoft has identified a new malware called Crypto Clipper that spreads via USB and uses Tor for command-and-control communication to steal cryptocurrency. The lightweight nature of the malware makes it easier to distribute and harder to detect. This discovery highlights evolving threats targeting digital assets through alternative distribution methods.
content: Crypto Clipper spreads over USB and communicates over Tor.

zh.title: 微软发现偷取加密货币的新型轻量级后门
zh.summary: 微软已识别出一个名为Crypto Clipper的新型恶意软件，该软件通过USB传播并使用Tor进行命令与控制通信来盗取加密货币。这种恶意软件的轻量级特性使其更容易传播且更难被检测。这一发现突显了针对数字资产的日益演进的威胁，通过替代分发方式进行传播。

title: FDA advisors unanimously vote to approve Moderna's mRNA after agency drama
summary: FDA advisors have unanimously voted to approve Moderna's mRNA vaccine after a contentious period in which a Trump administration official refused to review it. The unanimous vote indicates strong scientific confidence in the vaccine despite recent political tensions. This marks a significant moment in the vaccine approval process following months of regulatory uncertainty.
content: In February, a Trump official refused to review the vaccine.

zh.title: FDA顾问在机构风波后一致投票批准现代公司的mRNA疫苗
zh.summary: 在特朗普政府官员拒绝审查现代公司mRNA疫苗的争议时期后，FDA顾问一致投票批准了该疫苗。一致投票表明尽管近期存在政治紧张局势，科学界对该疫苗充满信心。这标志着经过数月监管不确定性后，疫苗批准流程的一个重要时刻。

title: As China looms, Taiwan makes more drones for defense and the US military
summary: Taiwan is increasing drone production for both domestic defense against China and potential export to the U.S. military. The dual-purpose strategy strengthens Taiwan's defense capabilities while creating new export opportunities. This reflects Taiwan's growing role in advanced defense technology production amid geopolitical tensions.
content: Taiwan's drone spending plans for defense could also boost business overseas.

zh.title: 面对中国威胁，台湾加大无人机生产用于防御和供应美军
zh.summary: 台湾正在增加无人机生产，用于对抗中国的国内防御和向美国军方出口。这种双重目的战略加强了台湾的防御能力，同时创造了新的出口机会。这反映了在地缘政治紧张局势中，台湾在先进防御技术生产中角色的日益提升。

title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
summary: AI inference platform Baseten is raising $1.5 billion at a $13 billion valuation, just months after a previous mega-round, capitalizing on the surge in demand for AI inference infrastructure. The rapid funding reflects intense investor interest in companies serving the growing AI deployment market. Baseten's momentum demonstrates the lucrative opportunity in AI model execution and deployment.
content: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.

zh.title: AI推理初创公司Baseten据报道在上一轮巨额融资后数月内融资15亿美元
zh.summary: AI推理平台Baseten以130亿美元估值融资15亿美元，时间距离上一轮巨额融资仅数月，以此应对对AI推理基础设施需求的激增。快速融资反映了投资者对服务不断增长AI部署市场的企业的强烈兴趣。Baseten的发展势头展示了AI模型执行和部署中的巨大商机。

title: NASA asks Northrop Grumman to stop working on lunar HALO module
summary: NASA has instructed Northrop Grumman to halt work on the lunar HALO (Habitation and Logistics Outpost) module as part of budget or strategic restructuring. The company is reassigning affected employees to other programs, suggesting potential cost or schedule issues. This decision impacts NASA's lunar exploration timeline and infrastructure plans.
content: "We are reassigning most affected employees across existing opportunities and programs."

zh.title: NASA要求诺斯罗普·格鲁曼公司停止月球HALO模块项目
zh.summary: NASA已指示诺斯罗普·格鲁曼公司暂停月球HALO（居住和后勤前哨）模块的工作，作为预算或战略调整的一部分。该公司正在将受影响的员工重新分配到其他项目，暗示存在潜在的成本或进度问题。这一决定将影响NASA的月球探索计划和基础设施建设。

title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
summary: Snapchat parent company Snap is spinning off its AI video development team into a new independent company called Dotmo as a cost-cutting measure. Current Snap employees working on AI video technology will transition to the new entity focused exclusively on video AI. This move reflects corporate restructuring efforts and Snap's shifting priorities in its core business.
content: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be composed of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.

zh.title: Snap因成本问题将AI视频团队分离成立新公司Dotmo
zh.summary: Snapchat母公司Snap正将其AI视频开发团队分离，成立名为Dotmo的新独立公司，作为成本削减措施。目前从事AI视频技术工作的Snap员工将转入专注于视频AI的新实体。这一举措反映了公司重组调整和Snap在核心业务中优先级的转变。

title: Valve is so behind on Steam Controller orders that some won’t ship until 2027
summary: Valve is facing significant backlogs on Steam Controller orders, with new reservations now expected to ship in 2027 due to supply constraints. The company provides shipping estimates ranging from September 2026 to 2027, reflecting massive demand outpacing production capacity. Despite the delays, Valve remains committed to manufacturing the controllers and is managing customer expectations transparently.
content:
Valve has some good news and bad news about Steam Controllers. The good news: If you make a reservation for a Steam Controller, the company will now show you one of three estimates of when you'll be able to actually order your gamepad: by September 2026, by December 2026, or sometime in 2027. The bad news: Any reservations made today "indicate a 2027 date for shipping," Valve says.
"We have no plans to stop making Steam Controller," according to Valve. "But as we look at the current demand compared to how many we know we can make by the end of the year, we want to manage expectations as much as we can with regards to when folks can expect t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve的Steam控制器订单严重积压，部分产品要到2027年才能发货
zh.summary: Valve面临Steam控制器订单严重积压，由于供应链限制，新订单预计将在2027年发货。该公司提供的发货时间估计从2026年9月至2027年不等，反映了需求远超生产能力的现象。尽管存在延迟，Valve仍致力于制造这些控制器，并透明地管理客户预期。

title: You can now use the Game Boy Camera with your phone
summary: Epilogue has released a new mobile app called Flashback that enables Game Boy Camera functionality on smartphones through the GB Operator accessory, expanding retro gaming possibilities to mobile devices. The app allows users to take low-resolution photos in the iconic Game Boy style without needing the original hardware. This nostalgic addition highlights growing interest in retro gaming technology adapted for modern platforms.
content:
You don’t need a Game Boy Camera or a GB Operator dock to use Epilogue’s new Flashback app. | Image: Epilogue	

The $50 GB Operator is an accessory that lets you connect, play, and authenticate Game Boy, Game Boy Color, and Game Boy Advance cartridges on PCs and other devices. Now it's getting some new functionality for the Game Boy Camera. After turning the Game Boy Camera into a charmingly awful desktop webcam two years ago, device-maker Epilogue has just released an iOS/Android mobile app so you can take photos while the Game Boy accessory is connected to your smartphone through the GB Operator.
The Game Boy Camera was a terrible camera even by 1998 standards when it was released. It captured 0.01434-megapixel images in just four shades of gray an …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你现在可以在手机上使用Game Boy相机了
zh.summary: Epilogue发布了一款名为Flashback的新移动应用，通过GB Operator配件在智能手机上实现Game Boy相机功能，将复古游戏体验扩展到移动设备。该应用允许用户以标志性的Game Boy风格拍摄低分辨率照片，无需原始硬件。这个怀旧功能体现了人们对适应现代平台的复古游戏技术日益增长的兴趣。

title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
summary: OpenAI is strengthening its leadership team ahead of its planned IPO by recruiting Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump administration AI policy official Dean Ball. These high-profile hires signal OpenAI's focus on both technical advancement and government relations as it prepares for public markets. The dual appointments underscore OpenAI's strategy to combine cutting-edge AI talent with political influence.
content: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.

zh.title: OpenAI在IPO前启用重量级人物
zh.summary: OpenAI通过从Google DeepMind招募Transformer共同发明人Noam Shazeer和前特朗普政府AI政策官员Dean Ball，为计划中的IPO做准备，强化其领导团队。这些高知名度的招聘表明OpenAI在为进入公开市场做准备时，重点关注技术进步和政府关系。这两项任命强调了OpenAI将尖端AI人才与政治影响力结合的战略。

title: Android verification is coming: Google confirms timeline and supported app stores
summary: Google has confirmed a timeline for Android app verification system updates, with rollout beginning this month and major changes taking effect in September. The new system service will verify app authenticity across multiple app stores, representing a significant shift in Android's security and distribution model. This change affects all app stores supporting Android and developers distributing apps outside Google Play.
content: A new system service will roll out this month ahead of big changes starting in September.

zh.title: Android验证即将推出：Google确认时间表和支持的应用商店
zh.summary: Google已确认了Android应用验证系统更新的时间表，本月开始推出，九月将实施主要变更。新系统服务将验证多个应用商店中的应用真实性，代表Android安全性和分发模式的重大转变。这一变化影响所有支持Android的应用商店以及在Google Play之外分发应用的开发者。

title: The 11 standout startups from YC’s Demo Day, according to VCs
summary: TechCrunch identified 11 standout startups from Y Combinator's Spring 2026 Demo Day based on investor input, with some achieving valuations exceeding $175 million. The batch demonstrates strong investor appetite for emerging startups across various sectors. These companies represent the latest wave of promising ventures attracting significant venture capital interest.
content: TechCrunch spoke to investors to find the hottest startups in the Spring 2026 YC batch. Some of them commanded valuations of over $175 million, VCs said.

zh.title: YC演示日中的11家杰出初创公司（根据风险投资家）
zh.summary: TechCrunch根据投资者意见，从Y Combinator 2026春季演示日中确认了11家杰出初创公司，其中部分公司估值超过1.75亿美元。该批次展示了投资者对各个行业新兴初创公司的强烈兴趣。这些公司代表了吸引重大风险投资的最新一批有前景的企业。

title: Apple patches high-severity eavesdropping vulnerability in Beats Studio Buds
summary: Apple has released a security patch addressing a high-severity eavesdropping vulnerability in Beats Studio Buds that was disclosed 12 months ago. The flaw, which affects multiple audio equipment manufacturers beyond Apple, could have allowed unauthorized audio interception. The patch closure highlights the importance of timely security updates for audio devices with wireless connectivity.
content: The vulnerability, disclosed 12 months ago, affects multiple manufacturers.

zh.title: Apple修复Beats Studio Buds中的高严重性窃听漏洞
zh.summary: Apple已发布安全补丁，解决了Beats Studio Buds中12个月前披露的高严重性窃听漏洞。该漏洞影响不止Apple的多个音频设备制造商，可能允许未授权的音频拦截。补丁的发布凸显了对具有无线连接功能的音频设备进行及时安全更新的重要性。

title: Rivian owners file lawsuit alleging false promises on self-driving features
summary: Rivian owners have filed a class-action lawsuit alleging the company falsely promised hands-free driving capabilities for its first-generation R1 vehicles for years without delivering. The suit represents growing consumer frustration over unfulfilled autonomous driving commitments.
content: Plaintiffs in the class -action complaint allege Rivian falsely promised for years it would bring hands-free driving to its first-generation R1 vehicles.

zh.title: Rivian 车主因自动驾驶虚假承诺提起诉讼
zh.summary: Rivian 车主提起集体诉讼，指控该公司多年来虚假承诺为第一代 R1 车型提供免手操控驾驶功能但未能交付。该诉讼反映了消费者对自动驾驶承诺未兑现的日益增长的不满。

title: HBO Max’s annual plans are 28 percent off right now
summary: HBO Max is offering 28% off annual subscription plans through July 15, reducing costs to $78.99 for basic, $132.99 for standard, and $164.99 for premium tiers. The promotion represents up to 40% savings versus month-to-month pricing.
content:
You can stream Sinners and other recent Oscar winners for less with HBO Max's sale. | Image: Warner Bros. Pictures	

The easiest way to save on a streaming service is often to pay for a year upfront, which HBO Max is currently making a lot cheaper. Through July 15, 2026, new and returning subscribers can get 28 percent off any of HBO Max’s yearly plans, bringing the ad-supported tier down to $78.99 ($31 off) per year, the Standard plan to $132.99 ($52 off) per year, and the Premium tier to $164.99 per year ($65 off). That’s up to 40 percent less than paying month to month.
HBO Max

Where to Buy:

 $109.99 $78.99 at HBO Max (annual, basic)
 $184.99 $132.99 at HBO Max (annual, standard)
 $229.99 $164.99 at HBO Max (annual, premium)

All three plans include access to HBO Max’s extensive library of movies and TV shows, including films from Warner Bros. Pictures, DC Studios, A24, Studio Ghibli, and Turner Classic Movies. Subscribers can also stream recent Oscar winners and nominees like titles like Sinners, One Battle After Another, and Marty Supreme, alongside other HBO Max originals. On the TV side, you’ll also get access to popular series like The Pitt, Hacks, Euphoria, and Heated Rivalry, as well as longtime favorites such as Game of Thrones, Friends, and The Big Bang Theory. 
The biggest differences come down to features. The ad-supported Basic plan lets you stream on up to two devices simultaneously, while the Standard plan lets you download up to 30 shows and movies  for offline viewing. It also includes access to live sports from the likes of the MLB, U.S Soccer, college football, NHL, and more. The Premium tier lets you stream on up to four devices at once, supports 4K and Dolby Atmos, and increases offline downloads to 100 titles.

zh.title: HBO Max 年度计划现可享受 28% 的折扣
zh.summary: HBO Max 在 7 月 15 日前对年度订阅计划提供 28% 的折扣，将成本降至基础版 $78.99、标准版 $132.99 和高级版 $164.99。与按月订阅相比，该促销最高可节省 40%。

title: Snap’s Specs look good on nobody
summary: Snap has unveiled new AR smart glasses featuring years of AR lens development in a compact design at $2,195, positioning itself at the forefront of face-computer technology. However, promotional images reveal the device's large, heavy stems create an awkward aesthetic when worn.
content:
Snap's new smart glasses are probably the most impressive bit of face-computer technology we've seen. They're not VR-headset huge; they don't have a big charging puck; thanks to Snap's many years of AR lens development, they're likely to have a lot of features right out of the box. (Yes, they're $2,195,  but that may just be what all this tech costs right now.) Snap is clearly at the front of this race.
And then… you see the pictures. The pictures of Snap CEO Evan Spiegel wearing the new Specs, as the enormous and heavy stems smash down on his ears. The pictures of models and athletes wearing Specs, carefully posed to hide the obvious weigh …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Snap的Specs眼镜没人看着好看
zh.summary: Snap推出了新款AR智能眼镜，融合多年AR镜片开发技术，采用紧凑设计，定价2,195美元，将自己定位在人机交互技术前沿。不过，宣传图片显示该设备笨重的镜腿在佩戴时呈现出不雅的外观。

title: The best early Amazon Prime Day deals so far
summary: Amazon Prime Day early deals are now live ahead of the June 23 official start, including Apple AirPods Pro 3 at their lowest price of $179 and Ring's battery doorbell at $60 off. More deals across additional brands are expected as the full Prime Day event approaches.
content:
The products pictured here aren’t on sale, but we certainly hope they will be soon. | Image: Alex Parkin / The Verge	

Amazon’s earlier-than-usual Prime Day doesn’t begin until June 23rd, but there are several even earlier deals on must-have products that you can check out right now. To name some examples, Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 are selling at their cheapest-ever price at Amazon and Walmart (though, the sale keeps playing peek-a-boo). Also, you can grab Ring’s latest battery-powered doorbell for $60 off and it includes a free Indoor Cam Plus with purchase. There are also enough early Apple deals and discounts on fantastic robovacs that we’ve spun up coverage ahead of next week.
While the pre-Prime Day deals are looking good so far, you may not see the brands or products you’re looking for — hopefully, those deals will come later in June. Still, we’ve only included early deals that meet the criteria we hold for all our commerce coverage: they’re good products sold at attractive prices.
We’ll update this post frequently ahead of Prime Day.
Headphone / earbud deals
Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 have been available at their lowest price to date for the past week or so. Originally $249, the noise-canceling, wireless earbuds are $179 at Amazon and Best Buy — no membership required. Walmart has a product page that lists $169 as a sale price, though it’s out of stock at the time of publication. The AirPods Pro 3 are the latest earbuds from Apple, packing better bass and active noise cancellation than their predecessor, plus the ability to do some light fitness tracking, among other niceties. Read our review.
Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones (second-gen)
The latest over-ear, noise-canceling headphones from Bose offer longer battery life over ANC, plus lossless audio support via USB-C. 

Where to Buy:

 $449 $379 at Amazon
 $449 $379 at Best Buy

The AirPods 4 on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for $99 ($30 off). Apple’s entry-level earbuds offer richer bass than previous gene

zh.title: 目前最好的亚马逊Prime Day提前优惠
zh.summary: 亚马逊Prime Day早期优惠现已生效，官方活动将于6月23日开始。优惠包括Apple AirPods Pro 3降至最低价179美元，Ring电池门铃优惠60美元。随着完整Prime Day活动的临近，预计会有更多品牌的优惠。

title: Almost half of U.S. singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
summary: About 47% of U.S. singles view AI negatively in dating apps, but many are open to AI-assisted profile improvements and conversation starters. This reveals mixed sentiment about AI's role in modern dating.
content: About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but, many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and conversation starters.

zh.title: 美国近半数单身人士对约会应用中的AI持负面态度，Match表示
zh.summary: 约47%的美国单身人士对约会应用中的AI持消极态度，但许多人对AI辅助的资料改进和对话开场白持开放态度。这反映了人们对AI在现代约会中的作用持有混合态度。

title: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
summary: AWS is negotiating to sell its AI chips to other data centers, representing a potential $50 billion business opportunity for Amazon. The move positions Amazon as a direct competitor to Nvidia in AI infrastructure.
content: AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.

zh.title: 亚马逊希望通过销售自己的AI芯片更直接地挑战英伟达
zh.summary: AWS正在谈判向其他数据中心销售其AI芯片，这代表着亚马逊50亿美元的潜在商业机会。此举将亚马逊定位为AI基础设施领域英伟达的直接竞争对手。

title: After Senate vote, Trump admin backs off plans to kill ocean monitoring
summary: Following a Senate vote, the Trump administration has reversed its plans to eliminate ocean monitoring systems. The status of the monitoring infrastructure remains unclear.
content: It's unclear whether the system is currently intact.

zh.title: 参议院投票后，特朗普政府放弃关闭海洋监测的计划
zh.summary: 在参议院投票后，特朗普政府已经撤回了消除海洋监测系统的计划。监测基础设施的状态仍不清楚。

title: This robotic self-driving toilet comes to you
summary: Chinese company Yueban unveiled an autonomous self-driving toilet designed for elderly and mobility-impaired users, using robot vacuum-like technology. The device is expected to cost approximately $4,300 in China, with global availability unconfirmed.
content:
During a recent expo in Shanghai that focuses on elderly care, assistive devices, and rehabilitation medicine, a Chinese company called Yueban debuted a smart toilet that does something we haven't seen before; it comes to you. The autonomous self-driving Xiaoban toilet was designed to improve accessibility for those dealing with mobility issues due to age, injuries, or disabilities. It's expected to sell for ¥28,999 yuan in China, or nearly $4,300, according to IT Home, but global availability hasn't been confirmed.
The Xiaoban toilet uses technology similar to what's found in the most advanced robot vacuums. A suite of sensors, including l …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这款机器人自动驾驶马桶来找你了
zh.summary: 中国公司Yueban推出了一款自主自动驾驶马桶，专为老年人和行动不便的用户设计，采用类似机器人吸尘器的技术。该设备在中国的预期成本约为4,300美元，全球供应情况尚未确认。

title: Rivian owners sue over false promises on self-driving features
summary: A class action lawsuit alleges that Rivian falsely promised hands-free driving capabilities for its first-generation R1 vehicles for years. The suit seeks accountability for unmet autonomous driving claims.
content: Plaintiffs in the class action complaint allege Rivian falsely promised for years it would bring hands-free driving to its first-generation R1 vehicles.

zh.title: Rivian车主起诉虚假自动驾驶功能承诺
zh.summary: 一项集体诉讼声称，Rivian多年来虚假承诺其第一代R1车型具备免提驾驶功能。该诉讼要求对未履行的自动驾驶承诺进行问责。

title: Mivo’s new app takes a mindful approach to managing screen time
summary: The new Mivo Scrolling app addresses excessive social media use through mindful practices rather than strict limits. The approach aims to help users regain control of their time spent scrolling.
content: Doomscrolling on social media is a very common problem and can feel like an endless loop of constantly losing track of time. Instead of tackling this issue with strict limits, a new mindful screen time app called Mivo Scrolling is trying to shake things up. Launched last month, Mivo doesn’t look super different from other […]

zh.title: Mivo的新应用采用正念方法管理屏幕使用时间
zh.summary: 新的Mivo Scrolling应用通过正念练习而非严格限制来解决过度社交媒体使用问题。这种方法旨在帮助用户重新控制他们的滚动时间。

title: AI data centers just got a government-mandated fast lane to the grid
summary: The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission ordered grid operators to expedite data center interconnections to accelerate AI infrastructure expansion. However, the mandate doesn't address underlying electricity supply shortages.
content: FERC told grid operators to give data centers a fast lane for interconnections, but it failed to address electricity supply shortages.

zh.title: AI数据中心获得政府强制的电网快速通道
zh.summary: 联邦能源监管委员会要求电网运营商加快数据中心互连，以加速AI基础设施扩展。但是，该命令未解决潜在的电力供应短缺问题。

title: Before SpaceX IPO, investors in China secretly acquired stakes
summary: Before SpaceX's planned IPO, Chinese investors secretly acquired stakes in the company, including one previously unreported investor with ties to Chinese military contractors. The revelation raises concerns about foreign investment in the aerospace firm.
content: One previously unreported SpaceX investor has ties to Chinese military contractors.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO前，中国投资者秘密收购股份
zh.summary: 在SpaceX计划进行首次公开募股前，中国投资者秘密收购了该公司的股份，其中包括一家此前未曾披露与中国军事承包商有关联的投资者。这一披露引发了对航空航天公司外资投资的担忧。

title: A year of Walmart Plus is half off ahead of Prime Day
summary: Walmart is offering a one-year Walmart Plus membership for $49, down from $98, including free shipping and bundled perks like Paramount Plus or Peacock. The promotion precedes Walmart's competing sales event during Prime Day 2026.
content:
Do you often find yourself shopping at the big blue, or perhaps you’re just looking for an alternative to Amazon? Either way, Walmart is currently offering a year of its Walmart Plus subscription for $49, which typically costs $98. The membership includes perks like free delivery on orders over $35, free next-day and two-day shipping from Walmart.com when available, and free home pickup for returns. Importantly, it also grants you early access to sales, including the upcoming Walmart Deals starting on June 22nd that coincide with Prime Day 2026.
Walmart Plus
Walmart Plus is a membership program that offers exclusive benefits, like free delivery from your store, free shipping with no order minimum, and more.

Where to Buy:

 $98 $49 at Walmart (annual cost for one year)

In addition to the aforementioned shopping perks, the subscription bundles in a handful of other offers and memberships. For instance, you can choose from either ad-supported Paramount Plus or Peacock, with the option to switch every 90 days. You’ll also get a Pawp membership for remote veterinary care, discounts on gas at Walmart and Sam’s Club, and even a free Whopper with any purchase from Burger King every three months.

zh.title: 沃尔玛Plus一年会员在Prime Day前夕享受五折优惠
zh.summary: 沃尔玛正提供一年期沃尔玛Plus会员资格,价格为49美元(原价98美元),包括免费配送和Paramount Plus或Peacock等捆绑福利。该促销活动先于2026年Prime Day期间沃尔玛的竞争性销售活动进行。

title: Firefox’s new home page widgets are helping me focus
summary: Firefox is rolling out new home page widgets including sports scores, time zones, focus timer, and checklist functionality. The additions bring productivity tools directly to the browser's new tab page.
content:
I launched Firefox this morning to find some new blocks on my home page. The widgets that are currently rolling out add sports scores, time zones, a focus timer, and a checklist, which are already some of my favorite new Firefox features in years. I usually have Focus Friend open on my phone when I need a focus timer, and I use Google Tasks for my checklists. Now I can check in with similar tools every time I open a new Firefox tab instead.
My phone's homescreen is full of useful widgets, so it's a nice addition to have the timer and checklist pop up on my browser - they add some extra functionality and blend in tools I was already using el …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 火狐浏览器的新主页小工具帮助我集中注意力
zh.summary: 火狐浏览器推出新的主页小工具,包括体育比分、时区、专注计时器和清单功能。这些功能将生产力工具直接整合到浏览器的新标签页中。

title: The smartphone era created an attention crisis. Slowtech is fixing it
summary: The 'slowtech' movement addresses the attention crisis created by smartphones, with users seeking tools and approaches to reclaim control over their time and focus. The trend reflects growing demand for less intrusive technology design.
content: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

zh.title: 智能手机时代造成了注意力危机。Slowtech正在解决这一问题
zh.summary: "Slowtech"运动应对智能手机造成的注意力危机,用户寻求工具和方法来重新控制他们的时间和专注力。这一趋势反映了人们对非侵入式技术设计的日益增长的需求。

title: Texas government data breach allowed hackers to steal 3 million driver’s licenses and passports
summary: A data breach of Texas government systems compromised personal identification documents for over 3 million residents, including driver's licenses and passports. The incident exposes the vulnerability of government databases to unauthorized access.
content: A data breach involving government-issued ID documents affects over three million people in Texas.

zh.title: 德克萨斯州政府数据泄露导致黑客盗取300万份驾驶执照和护照
zh.summary: 德克萨斯州政府系统遭遇数据泄露，超过300万居民的身份证件被泄露，包括驾驶执照和护照。这一事件暴露了政府数据库面临未经授权访问的脆弱性。

title: Bernie Sanders unveils $7 trillion plan to give Americans control of AI industry
summary: Bernie Sanders has unveiled a $7 trillion plan to shift control of the AI industry to Americans through a wealth-sharing mechanism. The proposal is expected to face significant opposition from major AI companies.
content: Biggest AI firms will likely recoil at Bernie Sanders' AI wealth fund.

zh.title: 伯尼·桑德斯推出70亿美元计划，让美国人控制AI行业
zh.summary: 伯尼·桑德斯推出了一项70亿美元的计划，旨在通过财富共享机制将AI行业的控制权转移给美国人。该提案预计将面临主要AI公司的重大反对。

title: The Onion’s rebooted InfoWars is coming July 2nd
summary: The Onion's satirical InfoWars reboot launches July 2nd as a comedy and cultural platform, developed with Sandy Hook families' support. The acquisition transforms the conspiracy network previously led by Alex Jones into a comedic media venture.
content:
InfoWars founder Alex Jones speaks to the media outside Waterbury Superior Court during his trial on September 21, 2022. | Getty Images	

The Onion's InfoWars officially has a launch date: On July 2nd, the conspiracy network previously run by Alex Jones will return as a comedy and media platform. The reboot comes more than a year and a half after news broke that the satirical news site was working to acquire the property owned by Jones, a conspiracy theorist who notably targeted victims of the Sandy Hook school shooting.
"Developed with the support of the Sandy Hook families, the new InfoWars is being reimagined as a comedy and cultural platform featuring original programming, guest talent, and new comedic voices," a press release reads. "The project reflects The Onion's broa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 讽刺媒体《洋葱报》重启的InfoWars将于7月2日上线
zh.summary: 《洋葱报》的讽刺性InfoWars重启版将于7月2日作为喜剧和文化平台上线，由Sandy Hook家族支持开发。这项收购将曾由亚历克斯·琼斯领导的阴谋论网络转变为喜剧媒体企业。

title: ‘Queer Eye’s’ life coach Karamo Brown launches Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone
summary: Karamo Brown, known from Netflix's 'Queer Eye,' launched Kē, a wellness app powered by his AI digital clone to guide users through fitness, meditation, and personal growth. The app reflects Brown's focus on holistic wellness and digital health coaching.
content: Karamo Brown, famous for his pep talks on Netflix’s “Queer Eye,” has jumped into the wellness and AI space with his new app, Kē. After spending a year and a half focusing on his own journey—from fitness and nutrition to meditation, sobriety, relationships, and personal growth—Brown wants to help others do the same.  Kē offers […]

zh.title: 《Queer Eye》生活教练Karamo Brown推出Kē健康应用，配备其AI数字分身
zh.summary: 来自Netflix《Queer Eye》的Karamo Brown推出了健康应用Kē，由其AI数字分身驱动，为用户提供健身、冥想和个人成长指导。该应用反映了Brown对整体健康和数字健康指导的关注。

title: Amazon employees say they’re facing termination for backing data center limits
summary: Three Amazon software engineers who testified against data center expansion at Seattle City Council hearings claim the company is retaliating by investigating potential termination. The engineers cite Seattle's law protecting political speech as grounds for their allegations.
content:
When three Amazon software engineers testified earlier this month at Seattle City Council hearings about data centers, they started their testimony by citing a city law barring employment discrimination over political speech. Now, they're accusing their employer of breaking that law by retaliating against them. 
On June 10th - one week after the hearing, and one day after the City Council passed a milestone moratorium on data centers - Patrick Schloesser, Darius Irani, and Liesl Wigand were each called into an impromptu meeting with Amazon's "Employee Relations." HR representatives told the employees that the company was investigating them  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊员工称因支持数据中心限制而面临解聘
zh.summary: 三名在西雅图市议会听证会上作证反对数据中心扩展的亚马逊软件工程师声称，公司正在通过调查进行报复，可能会导致解聘。这些工程师援引西雅图保护政治言论的法律作为其指控的依据。

title: Apple opens up App Store to new competition in Brazil
summary: Apple is loosening its grip on iPhone app distribution in Brazil, another major market embracing alternative app stores. The move reflects regulatory pressures on Apple's App Store monopoly in multiple regions.
content: Apple’s grip on iPhone app distribution is loosening in another major market: Brazil.

zh.title: 苹果在巴西开放App Store面对新竞争
zh.summary: 苹果在巴西放松了对iPhone应用分发的控制力，这是又一个拥抱替代应用商店的主要市场。这一举措反映了多个地区对苹果App Store垄断地位的监管压力。

title: MapTap, a daily geography game, is my new Wordle
summary: MapTap is a daily geography-based puzzle game offering a Wordle-like experience that challenges and educates users. The game combines entertainment with geographic knowledge building.
content: MapTap is a phone game that will make you feel smarter after you play it.

zh.title: MapTap，一款日常地理游戏，是我的新Wordle
zh.summary: MapTap是一款基于地理的日常谜题游戏，提供类似Wordle的体验，可以挑战和教育用户。该游戏将娱乐与地理知识建设相结合。

title: General Intuition in talks to raise $300M at around $2B valuation
summary: General Intuition, a startup developing embodied AI and world models, is in talks to raise $300 million at a $2 billion valuation using Medal's dataset of 2 billion videos annually from 10 million users. The funding round reflects growing investment in AI model training infrastructure.
content: The startup trains embodied AI and world models using Medal’s dataset of 2 billion videos per year from 10 million monthly active users.

zh.title: General Intuition融资谈判中融资3亿美元，估值约20亿美元
zh.summary: 初创公司General Intuition正在进行融资谈判，融资3亿美元，估值约20亿美元，利用Medal数据集（来自1000万用户的年度20亿视频）开发具身AI和世界模型。此次融资轮反映了对AI模型训练基础设施投资的增加。

title: A tech worker-backed PAC is bringing a $5M knife to Big Tech’s $100M gunfight
summary: Guardrails, a tech worker-backed PAC, is launching a $5 million grassroots campaign funded by AI industry employees to counter Big Tech's estimated $100 million political spending. The effort positions itself as a populist challenge to major tech corporations' political influence.
content: Guardrails positions itself as a populist political movement that runs on small donations from people in the trenches of the AI boom.

zh.title: 科技工作者支持的政治行动委员会用500万美元对阵Big Tech的1亿美元政治支出
zh.summary: Guardrails是一个由科技工作者支持的政治行动委员会，正在发起一项由AI行业员工资助的500万美元基层活动，以对抗Big Tech估计1亿美元的政治支出。该努力将自己定位为对主要科技公司政治影响力的平民主义挑战。

title: Hunter-gatherers in Siberia died of a plague outbreak 5,500 years ago
summary: Archaeological evidence shows hunter-gatherers in Siberia died from a plague outbreak approximately 5,500 years ago. The discovery challenges previous theories attributing such Neolithic-era disease outbreaks to agricultural transition effects.
content: We can't blame the Neolithic Transition for the plague anymore.

zh.title: 西伯利亚的狩猎采集者5500年前死于瘟疫爆发
zh.summary: 考古证据表明西伯利亚的狩猎采集者约5500年前死于瘟疫爆发。这一发现挑战了之前将新石器时代疾病爆发归因于农业转变影响的理论。

title: The first long-duration resident of the ISS, a cosmonaut, has died
summary: A pioneering cosmonaut who was a long-duration resident of the International Space Station has died after completing two expeditions, two spacewalks, and 322 days in orbit. The loss marks a significant moment in human spaceflight history.
content: Two expeditions, two spacewalks, 322 days in space.

zh.title: 国际空间站的首位长期驻站宇航员已离世
zh.summary: 一位曾长期驻扎在国际空间站的先驱宇航员已离世，他完成了两次远征、两次太空行走和322天的太空生活。这一损失标志着人类太空飞行历史上的一个重要时刻。

title: Spotify’s reserved ticket sales to music superfans are now going live
summary: Spotify is launching "Reserved," a new feature that allocates concert tickets to artists' superfans before general public sales begin. The system rewards Spotify's most engaged listeners with early access to live events.
content: Spotify is launching "Reserved," a new system that will hold two concert tickets for an artist's superfans before they're on sale to the public.

zh.title: Spotify向音乐超级粉丝预留的演唱会门票销售现已上线
zh.summary: Spotify推出了名为"Reserved"的新功能，在向公众开放之前，将演唱会门票分配给艺术家的超级粉丝。该系统通过早期获取现场活动的权限来奖励Spotify最活跃的听众。

title: Amazon’s Kindle Colorsoft bundle is almost half off for Prime Day
summary: Amazon's Kindle Colorsoft Essentials Bundle is on sale for $182.97, a 45% discount, exclusively for Prime members. The bundle includes a color E Ink e-reader, leather cover, and USB power adapter, offering the lowest price seen for this combo. The Colorsoft's color screen and multi-color highlighting make it particularly useful for comics, graphic novels, and illustrated content.
content:
The Amazon Kindle Colorsoft e-reader (left) sitting next to the Kobo Clara Colour displaying a Spider-Man comic. | Photos by Andrew Liszewski / The Verge	

Amazon’s Kindle Colorsoft Essentials Bundle is on sale for $182.97 (originally $334.97) as an early Prime Day deal, the lowest price we’ve seen for the combo. Unlike other Kindles, the Colorsoft’s color E Ink screen is great for comic books and graphics novels, illustrated books, or just perusing book covers while deciding what to read next. It shows deep black lines and borders, high saturation, plus it has a faster refresh rate than other similar options. 
The discounted bundle includes the 16GB e-reader, a leather cover in ruby or walnut, and a USB power adapter, and is available exclusively to Amazon Prime members.
Amazon Kindle Colorsoft Essentials Bundle

Where to Buy:

 $334.97 $182.97 at Amazon

A color e-reader is great for more than just comic books. Readers can highlight text in four different colors, then filter and search between them, and the color panel gives you plenty of options for contrast and boldness. Additionally, the Colorsoft is water resistant, with an IPX8 rating that means it’s safe to use by the pool and can be rinsed if you have a mishap with a beverage. Like other Kindles, the Colorsoft should run for weeks on a single charge, if not longer, depending on usage.
Read our Kindle Colorsoft review.

zh.title: 亚马逊Kindle Colorsoft套装Prime Day大幅打折近半价
zh.summary: 亚马逊Kindle Colorsoft Essentials套装正在特价销售，价格为$182.97，享受45%折扣，仅限Prime会员购买。该套装包含彩色E Ink电子阅读器、皮套和USB电源适配器，价格创下历史新低。Colorsoft的彩色屏幕和多色荧光笔功能使其特别适合漫画、图画小说和插图内容。

title: Adobe adds its AI assistant to Premiere, Illustrator and InDesign
summary: Adobe is expanding its Firefly AI assistant to Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io as part of a public beta launch. The new conversational AI assistants are specialized for each app, enabling users to organize work and automate app-specific editing tasks.
content: Adobe is updating its Firefly AI assistant with new chops, and adding it to Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign and Frame.io.

zh.title: Adobe将其AI助手扩展到Premiere、Illustrator和InDesign
zh.summary: Adobe正在公开测试版中将其Firefly AI助手扩展到Premiere、Illustrator、InDesign和Frame.io。新的对话式AI助手针对每个应用进行了专门设计，使用户能够组织工作并自动化应用特定的编辑任务。

title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants
summary: Adobe's Creative Cloud suite is receiving new conversational AI assistants in a public beta, with Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io each getting specialized bots. These AI agents are designed to organize work and automate app-specific tasks, with each assistant fine-tuned for its respective application.
content:
Photoshop is one of several Adobe Creative Cloud apps to receive new conversational editing capabilities. | Image: Adobe	

Adobe's plan to stick AI assistants into all of its Creative Cloud suite is now fully underway, with new chatbots now rolling out to its biggest editing and design apps. As part of a public beta launching today, Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io now each have a bespoke AI Assistant that can be used to organize your work and automate app-specific tasks.
While the AI assistants are all powered by Adobe's "conversational creative agent," they work independently and operate "as a specialist" within each Creative Cloud app, according to Adobe's announcement. That means the Premiere AI assistant is fine-tuned for tasks like …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Photoshop和Premiere现在拥有AI助手
zh.summary: Adobe Creative Cloud套件在公开测试中获得了新的对话式AI助手，Photoshop、Premiere、Illustrator、InDesign和Frame.io各自获得了专门的机器人。这些AI代理旨在组织工作并自动化应用特定的任务，每个助手都针对其各自的应用进行了微调。

title: Adobe’s redesigned AI studio remembers what your creations look like
summary: Adobe is launching a redesigned Firefly AI studio in private beta that provides persistent context, reusable assets, and organized workflows for design projects. The new interface allows users to name and replicate characters, objects, and backgrounds, streamlining the process from ideation to production-ready designs without switching between apps.
content:
Give your characters, objects, and backgrounds a name to easily replicate them without changing the design. | Image: Adobe	

Adobe is introducing some new capabilities for its Firefly AI assistant, alongside a "reimagined" AI studio that lets you edit and generate new designs from a single interface. The new Firefly experience launching today in private beta is designed to give you "persistent context, reusable assets, and organized workflows" across your projects, according to Adobe, making it easier to go from ideation to production-ready designs without switching between apps.
This is the latest of several design overhauls to Adobe's all-in-one Firefly AI hub since it was first launched in September 2023. In addition to the UI updates, the new Firefly AI studi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Adobe 重新设计的 AI 工作室记住了您创意的样子
zh.summary: Adobe 正在推出私密测试版的重新设计 Firefly AI 工作室，提供持久化上下文、可重用资产和有组织的设计项目工作流程。新界面允许用户命名和复制角色、对象和背景，简化了从构思到生产就绪设计的流程，无需在应用之间切换。

title: Pixi’s new iOS app turns text messages into interactive AR experiences
summary: Pixi is launching a new iOS app that transforms text messages into interactive augmented reality experiences. The app represents a new direction for messaging platforms beyond traditional stickers, GIFs, and emoji reactions.
content: Forget stickers, GIFs, and emoji reactions. Pixi is betting that the next evolution of messaging is interactive augmented reality (AR).

zh.title: Pixi 的新 iOS 应用将文本消息转变为交互式 AR 体验
zh.summary: Pixi 正在推出一款新的 iOS 应用，将文本消息转变为交互式增强现实体验。该应用代表了信息平台超越传统贴纸、GIF 和表情符号反应的新方向。

title: This Ghost in the Shell keyboard makes me want to activate the hundred spidery robot fingers inside my regular fingers
summary: Iqunix has released Ghost in the Shell-themed versions of its EV63 mechanical keyboard, featuring anime-inspired designs that stand out among gaming peripherals. Priced at $249, the special edition commands a premium over the standard $169 model while maintaining excellent build quality and gaming performance with an 8,000Hz polling rate.
content:
These keyboards stand alone. Complex. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

Anime collaborations are everywhere, from Gundam watches and Naruto nights at Major League ballparks to just about anything Evangelion. But these Ghost in the Shell keyboards from Iqunix are some of the coolest examples I've seen of anime-inspired everyday tech. They look sick and they type and play great. At $249 they're a hefty upcharge over the regular $169 version, but that's still a decent price for such excellent build quality and unique designs.
The standard Iqunix EV63 that the Ghost in the Shell Edition is based on is a 65-percent Hall effect keyboard aimed at gamers. It's got a compact layout, an 8,000Hz polling rate, and ultra-se …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这款攻壳机动队键盘让我想激活我手指内的百只机械蜘蛛手指
zh.summary: Iqunix 推出了《攻壳机动队》主题版本的 EV63 机械键盘，采用动画启发的设计，在游戏外设中脱颖而出。特别版定价 $249，相比标准版的 $169 有溢价，同时保持卓越的构建质量和游戏性能，具有 8,000Hz 的轮询率。

title: Waymo recalls nearly 4,000 robotaxis to stop them driving into highway construction zones
summary: Waymo is recalling nearly 4,000 robotaxis to address a safety issue where vehicles have entered highway sections closed for construction. The company has documented at least 13 instances of this problem and is implementing a fix to prevent future occurrences.
content: The company has identified at least 13 instances where its robotaxis drove into highway sections closed for construction.

zh.title: Waymo召回近4,000辆机器人出租车以防止其驶入公路施工区
zh.summary: Waymo正在召回近4,000辆机器人出租车，以解决车辆进入因施工而关闭的公路区段的安全问题。该公司已记录了至少13起此类问题，并正在实施修复方案以防止今后再次发生。

title: Hulk, Punisher join Peter Parker in Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer
summary: Spider-Man: Brand New Day brings together heroes Hulk and Punisher alongside Peter Parker in a new trailer. The film features lighthearted interaction between the characters, suggesting a comedic tone.
content: Peter Parker to Bruce Banner: "I didn't know you could get that big."

zh.title: 绿巨人和惩罚者加入《蜘蛛侠:全新开始》预告中的彼得·帕克
zh.summary: 《蜘蛛侠:全新开始》将绿巨人和惩罚者等英雄与彼得·帕克汇聚一堂,推出了一支新预告片。这部电影展现了角色之间轻松诙谐的互动,暗示了喜剧基调。

title: NASA picks Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for Mars mission, setting up a race with SpaceX
summary: NASA has selected Relativity Space, acquired by former Google executive Eric Schmidt, for a Mars mission in competition with SpaceX. The selection is notable given Relativity's previous struggles to reach orbit.
content: Relativity Space—a rocket maker acquired by former Google executive chair Eric Schmidt last year after stumbling on the path to orbit—might just beat SpaceX to Mars.

zh.title: NASA选定埃里克·施密特的火箭公司执行火星任务,与SpaceX展开竞争
zh.summary: NASA已选定由前谷歌高管埃里克·施密特收购的相对论太空公司(Relativity Space)执行火星任务,与SpaceX竞争。鉴于相对论太空公司之前难以进入轨道,这一选择值得关注。

title: Midjourney goes from generating cat images to full-body ultrasound scans
summary: Midjourney is expanding into hardware with "The Midjourney Scanner," an ultrasound-based full-body health imaging device that CEO David Holz plans to integrate into a San Francisco spa. The device aims to provide MRI-quality imaging for regular health monitoring.
content:
“A scan of an imaging phantom, segmented to validate how cleanly structures separate under controlled conditions.“ | Image: Midjourney Medical	

Midjourney CEO David Holz just showed off the company's first hardware product and plans to build a San Francisco spa, which he admitted is a bit different from the "cat pictures" produced by its AI image generator. Dubbed The Midjourney Scanner, it's an ultrasound-based full-body scanner that uses a ring of sensors to capture vertical slices of the inside of your body, looking at the composition of your muscle, fat, bone, and organs to start. Holz said ideally, you could do this once a year or every single day, as it "aims for image quality comparable to MRI in many ways."
He mentioned that one way he'd like to use it would be to see how h …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Midjourney从生成猫咪图像发展到全身超声波扫描
zh.summary: Midjourney正在扩展到硬件领域,推出"Midjourney扫描仪",这是一款基于超声波的全身健康成像设备,CEO大卫·霍尔茨计划将其集成到旧金山的一家水疗中心。该设备旨在为定期健康监测提供MRI质量的成像。

title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
summary: Google Docs users can disable the Gemini AI features that generate unwanted "write with Gemini" pop-ups in the application. This how-to guide provides steps for opting out of AI writing assistance.
content: Here's what you need to do to get those pesky "write with Gemini" pop-ups to go away.

zh.title: 如何在Google Docs中关闭AI
zh.summary: Google Docs用户可以禁用生成不需要的"用Gemini写作"弹出窗口的Gemini AI功能。这份操作指南提供了选择退出AI写作辅助的步骤。
